@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "caddy-5374-support-loading-placeholder-content-from-files-for-systemd-credential",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "caddy: Support loading placeholder content from files (for systemd credentials or docker secrets)",
+    "description": "Support loading placeholder content from files (for systemd credentials or docker secrets). Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current caddy setup",
+        "description": "Verify your caddy version and configuration:\n```bash\ncaddy version\n```\nThis feature requires a working caddy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review caddy configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant caddy configuration:\nIt would be nice to support loading secrets (e.g. api tokens for DNS auth) from files (as opposed to env vars).\n\nE.g. using a syntax like `{file./foo/bar/baz.txt}`, which would be replaced with the contents of the file at `/foo/bar/baz.txt`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support loading placeholder content from files (for systemd…",
+        "description": "Use the `{file.*}` placeholder syntax added in PR #5463 to load secrets from files. This replaces workarounds using environment variables or .env files.\n\nExample Caddyfile using file-based placeholders:\n```\nexample.com {\n  tls {\n    dns cloudflare {file./run/secrets/cf_api_token}\n  }\n}\n```\n\nFor Docker secrets or systemd credentials, place the secret in a file and reference it with `{file./path/to/secret}`. The file contents are read at runtime and substituted into the configuration."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support loading placeholder content from files (for systemd…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "PR #5463 added `{file.*}` placeholders to Caddy, allowing secrets and configuration values to be loaded directly from files. For example, `{file./run/secrets/api_token}` reads the content of that file at runtime. This is particularly useful for systemd credentials and Docker secrets where sensitive values should not be stored in environment variables or config files directly.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "curl -X POST -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" localhost:2019/config/apps/tls/automation/policies/0/issuers -d '{\n\t\"module\": \"acme\",\n\t\"challenges\": {\n\t\t\"dns\": {\n\t\t\t\"provider\": {\n\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"cloudflare\",\n\t\t\t\t\"api_token\": \"{env.CF_API_TOKEN}\"\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}'"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
